data.current_description: Create new event subscription for the specified app.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new event subscription for the specified app. Accepts a SubscriptionCreateRequest containing the event types to subscribe to and other subscription configuration. Returns a SubscriptionResponse with the created subscription details including its ID and status. Only one subscription per app is allowed; creating a new subscription will replace any existing subscription.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details. It doesn't explain what inputs are expected (SubscriptionCreateRequest structure), what the response contains (SubscriptionResponse), or important side effects (replacement of existing subscriptions). Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and constraints.

message: Operation 'post-/webhooks/v3/{appId}/subscriptions/batch/update_updateBatch' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable. data.current_description: Batch create event subscriptions for the specified app.
data.description_suggestion: Updates multiple event subscriptions in a single batch operation for the specified app. Accepts a BatchInputSubscriptionBatchUpdateRequest containing an array of subscription updates. Returns a BatchResponseSubscriptionResponseWithErrors containing the results for each subscription, including successful updates and any errors encountered. Supports partial batch success where some subscriptions may update successfully while others fail.

data.current_description: Update webhook settings for the specified app.
data.description_suggestion: Update webhook settings for the specified app, including the target URL and throttle configuration. Accepts a SettingsChangeRequest object with the new settings. Returns the updated SettingsResponse containing the webhook's target URL, throttle configuration, and modification timestamp. Existing event subscriptions will use the new settings immediately.

data.current_description: Delete an existing event subscription by ID.
